name: audit-pending-spec-fidelity exits zero and reports fidelity_audit=clean when every spec token appears in the architecture vocabulary
command: mkdir -p pending/F-4-x arch && printf '%s\n' '## Phase F' '- **F-4** Drift-detection skill: `rubric: ignore`, `--no-verify`.' > arch/a.md && printf '%s' '{"name":"x","command":"grep no-verify file","expect":{"exit_code":0}}' > pending/F-4-x/case.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/audit-pending-spec-fidelity.sh" --pending pending/F-4-x --arch arch/a.md 2>out.txt && grep -q 'fidelity_audit=clean' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
